ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of books available in stock */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the book was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the book's information was last updated */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the author's information was created */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the author */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the cart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cart (e.g., active, abandoned, checked out) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart's information was last updated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the cart */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart item's information was last updated */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "genre_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred genres */,
  "author_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred authors */,
  "publisher_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred publishers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the preferences were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the preferences were last updated */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred languages */,
  "reading_level_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred reading levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart history entry */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cart at the time of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart status was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who changed the cart status */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the cart at the time of the change */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the cart at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_history_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item history entry */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book at the time of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date when the cart item was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who changed the cart item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the book at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_history_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
